sections.title: Before speaking to the Easter Bunny

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Get out of my way stinky! I've got stew to make!

sections.title: Talking to Cooky Weasel after being told to fetch the carrots by Wheeler

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: What do you want, stinky?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello to you too. You must be Weasel then.

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Yes I am. Cooky Weasel to you. Finest cook this side of, well, pick an object - or a concept - or a location! I'm the best cook any side of anything what you can think of!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that why you're down in this hole?

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Hole?! This is a fine establishment. At least it was until you stank it up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good grief, this is going to be a long day.

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: What was that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I said Wheeler told me you might have some extra nice carrots I could use?

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Wheeler sent you eh? Hmm... Why would I give you my good carrots? Thems for roasting with honey, not for stinking up with your grubby mitts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to make some special carrot juice for the Easter Bunny, to try and cheer him up.

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Oh! Well why didn't you say so? Smells like a good idea to me. If anyone deserves some good juice, it's him!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Smells like you don't have space for these wonderful carrots. Clear some room and come back when you can handle the veggies!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: There's 3 fancy carrots for you, stinky. Now go and get that juice made before your stench rots 'em!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: You've managed to make carrot juice? Surprising, and it doesn't seem to stink. Almost unbelievable!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Smells to me like you've already got enough of my fancy carrots. Go away!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: What are you after now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need another carrot, I lost one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need more carrots, I lost some of them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need more carrots, I lost them all.

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: You weren't nibbling at them were you? I bet you were thinking about it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course not.

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Yeah right. Here, take 'em. Take all of my lovely carrots! Just make sure the Easter Bunny gets his juice this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you. Won't happen again.

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: You've been eating the carrots! I can smell 'em on your breath! You big stinking piggy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure I would remember eating such a delicous, sweet, crunchy, orange, juicy...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was the question?

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Take these carrots and get out of my sight.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah, oops. This time I will make the juice. Promise!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: You've got orange stains around your mouth!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Probably from the carrot juice.

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: YOU WHAT?!? You DRANK the juice that you made for the Easter Bunny?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was very good.

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Oh for... Please use these carrots for their intended purpose.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: You've been eating the carrots! I can smell 'em on your breath! You big stinking piggy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not only that, I drank the juice!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: YOU WHAT?!? You're a real piece of work. Do you think these carrots grow on trees?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Well they don't. They grow underground. And they're expensive. So either help the Easter Bunny, or stop wasting my stock!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll do my best.

sections.title: Talking to Cooky Weasel after giving the juice

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good news! The Easter Bunny loved the juice I made with your fancy carrots!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: I'm glad to hear it.

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Now clear off!

sections.title: Talking to Cooky Weasel near Varrock

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Keep your hands away from these lovely carrots, stinky!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wasn't anywhere near them!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: I can smell you getting closer, stinky!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want any carrots I'm just here for eggs!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Good, cause these carrots aren't for you, stinky!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine, I'm going!
